questionHtml:
An object is pushed from rest by a constant net force of 100 N. When the object has travelled 2.0 m the object has reached a velocity of 10 m s−1.

What is the mass of the object?

A.  2 kg

B.  4 kg

C.  40 kg

D.  200 kg

meta.title: An object is pushed from rest by a constant net force of 100 N. When the object has travelled 2.0 m the object has reached a velocity of 10 m s−1. What is the mass of the object? A
